subject: ap-calculus-bc
title: Vector-Valued Functions
stimulus:
For t (cid:149) 0, a particle is moving along a curve so that its position at time t is (cid:11)x(cid:11)t(cid:12), y(cid:11)t(cid:12)(cid:12). At time t (cid:32) 2, the
particle is at position (cid:11)1,5(cid:12). It is known that dx (cid:32) t (cid:14) 2 and dy (cid:32) sin2t.

parts.prompt:
Is the horizontal movement of the particle to the left or to the right at time t (cid:32) 2? Explain your answer.
Find the slope of the path of the particle at time t (cid:32) 2.
rubric_criteria: Is the horizontal movement of the particle to the left or to the right at time t = 2? Explain your answer.
Find the slope of the path of the particle at time t = 2.

parts.prompt: Find the x-coordinate of the particle’s position at time t (cid:32) 4.
rubric_criteria: Find the x-coordinate of the particle’s position at time t = 4.

parts.prompt: Find the speed of the particle at time t (cid:32) 4. Find the acceleration vector of the particle at time t (cid:32) 4.
rubric_criteria: Find the speed of the particle at time t = 4. Find the acceleration vector of the particle at time t = 4.

parts.prompt: Find the distance traveled by the particle from time t (cid:32) 2 to t (cid:32) 4.
rubric_criteria: Find the distance traveled by the particle from time t = 2 to t = 4.
